cells.rationale: Escalate-or-refuse contract plus a refuse-to-clobber guard that must not blank the pre-crash mirror is a subtle crash-recovery correctness invariant, but the surface is a bounded two-file edit with a clear approach.

Keystone verified-transaction engine: a new module, a multi-state machine with a never-false-verified invariant, torn-tail evidence reads, flock idempotency, and byte-pin cascades — a cross-cutting correctness-critical change.
Heuristic re-pinning through the event-sourced back-fill write path is correctness-critical because a dishonest match becomes a poisoning vector, though it reuses a sanctioned seam at S size.
Pattern-following fast sim, a copied slow-tier e2e convention, and forward-facing docs consolidation are workhorse test-and-docs work with no nameable intelligence-bound reason.
